pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.7.x to 3.2.x, which requires Java 17+ and introduces Jakarta EE namespace changes.
Upgrade Spring Cloud to a version compatible with Spring Boot 3.x.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Validation API, replacing implicit or javax-based validation dependencies.
Add explicit dependency for Jakarta JSON API to support modern JSON processing standards.
Upgrade gRPC and related Spring Boot starter to versions compatible with the new Spring Boot 3 stack.
Upgrade Protobuf to version 4.x to align with newer gRPC and build tool requirements.
Upgrade Hibernate Validator to version 8.x to support Jakarta Validation API.
Upgrade Activation API to version 2.x (Jakarta namespace) to replace the legacy javax.activation.
Upgrade Jackson to version 2.17.0 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.2.
Upgrade Netty to a newer patch version for security and stability improvements.
Upgrade JNA to version 5.14.0 for better native access support.
Upgrade OSHI to version 6.6.0 for updated system hardware information retrieval.
Upgrade Milo OPC UA stack to version 0.6.12 for protocol compliance and bug fixes.
Upgrade Bouncy Castle to version 1.78.1 for cryptographic algorithm updates and security patches.
Upgrade J-Interop to version 3.0.0 for COM interoperability improvements.
Upgrade SnakeYAML to version 2.2 for YAML parsing security and feature updates.
Minor bump of Maven GPG plugin for signing artifacts.
Remove MongoDB dependency property, likely due to architectural change or removal of MongoDB support.
Remove explicit Swagger and Knife4j dependencies, likely relying on SpringDoc or other Spring Boot 3 compatible alternatives.
Update project version, inception year, description, and developer details to reflect current state.
